narrative:
Champaign County has 26,157 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.0% of registrants.
